plugins.name: project-review
plugins.description: Multi-lane project review suite (16 lanes + 1 hub). Each lane targets a distinct review dimension (plan adherence, adversarial red-team, full audit, hallucinated artifact, scope creep, spec drift, failure mode, observability, perf/cost, breaking change, coupling, dep health, test strength, DX, harness meta, waste/yield). Cadence presets: after-task / after-feature / architecture. Designed to bolt into dharness via shared output schema (dharness-project/dharness-rating/review/{lane}/{date}.md) and trigger registry (workflow.review.{lane}).
